name: Custom Background
author: Max54nj
longDescription:
As the name suggests, this Addon lets you customize your background even further.

Features:
- Custom Images
- Toggle transparency for editor.
- Custom opacity
- Background image blur

Coming soon:
- Customizable sub windows
- Customizable context menus
- Api for other addons
- Maybe proper gif and video support?

You can suggest a feature or report a bug by opening an issue on GitHub or via DM on Discord.

Available Translations:
- English
- German

GitHub: https://github.com/max54nj/SkEditor-Custom-Background
Discord: max54nj
